author: bsunanda
body:
#### PR description:

Try to match DDD and DD4hep versions of the two DD algorithms used for creating the V19 geometry of HGCal

#### PR validation:

Check the parameters used in generating the geometries

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Nothing special
title: Phase2-hgx365W8 Try to match DDD and DD4hep versions of the two DD algorithms used for creating the V19 geometry of HGCal
